# Mini-dowel-table

![](/project.svg)



 Print 4 dowel caps, 1 4 way dowel joint, cut 1 table top, get 4 dowels of your desired diameter and length

**Value:** __GEOMETRY_INPUT__



## Inputs

- **LegAngle** (number)
- **TopDiameter** (number)
- **DowelDiam** (number)
- **Leg_length** (number)
- **Top_width** (number)
- **Top_Thickness** (number)
